news.title:

The shares were transacted at an approximate price of Rs. 1,708.1 each.

news.title:
Phoenix Mills FY26 retail consumption reaches Rs. 16,578 Cr, up 21% YoY.
Office leasing hits 4.8 msft at 70% occupancy; residential sales double to Rs. 471 Cr.
news.summary:
Phoenix Mills FY26 retail consumption reaches Rs. 16,578 Cr, up 21% YoY.

news.title:
Nifty Realty surges 4% as oil prices ease; Phoenix Mills, DLF gain up to 5%.
Sector hit 15% recently; analysts cautious due to inflation, rate sensitivity.
news.summary:
Nifty Realty surges 4% as oil prices ease; Phoenix Mills, DLF gain up to 5%.

news.title:
The Phoenix Mills Ltd participated in an investor meeting organized by Elara Securities on March 16, 2026.
Investors were briefed on the company's business overview and industry updates, complying with Regulation 30.
news.summary:

news.title:
Classic Mall, subsidiary of The Phoenix Mills, acquired 34.2% stake in Torrent Urja 22.
Over 70 lakh equity shares were allotted for renewable energy purchase.
news.summary:
Classic Mall, subsidiary of The Phoenix Mills, acquired 34.2% stake in Torrent Urja 22.

news.title:
Phoenix Mills focuses on mixed-use development as a growth strategy.
It sees potential in the future of commercial real estate.
news.summary:
Phoenix Mills focuses on mixed-use development as a growth strategy.

news.title:
The Phoenix Mills Ltd participated in Kotak India Conference on Feb 25, 2026.
Investors were briefed on the company's business overview and industry updates.
news.summary:
The Phoenix Mills Ltd participated in Kotak India Conference on Feb 25, 2026.

news.title:
DLF and Phoenix Mills have shelved REIT plans due to strong cash flows and regulatory concerns, despite recent SEBI reforms easing REIT rules.
DLF expects Rs 6,000 crore rental income by FY27 and Phoenix focuses on asset expansion over income distribution. Tata Realty plans REIT in 2 years.
news.summary:
DLF and Phoenix Mills have shelved REIT plans due to strong cash flows and regulatory concerns, despite recent SEBI reforms easing REIT rules.
DLF expects Rs 6,000 crore rental income by FY27 and Phoenix focuses on asset expansion over income distribution. Tata Realty plans REIT in 2 years.

news.title:
Phoenix Mills plans to raise Rs 1,500 crore for a 3.3 million sq ft Thane mixed-use project, engaging GIC, CPP Investments, and others.
Phoenix operates 11 million sq ft retail space, with 7 million sq ft under development, and partners with GIC/CPP for various projects.
news.summary:
Phoenix Mills plans to raise Rs 1,500 crore for a 3.3 million sq ft Thane mixed-use project, engaging GIC, CPP Investments, and others.
Phoenix operates 11 million sq ft retail space, with 7 million sq ft under development, and partners with GIC/CPP for various projects.

Investors were briefed on the company's general business overview and industry updates.
news.summary:

news.title:
The Phoenix Mills Ltd. will participate in the Nuvama India Conference 2026 on Feb 10 in Mumbai.
The meeting will include physical one-on-one/group sessions; details subject to change.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight rating on Phoenix Mills.
The target price set for Phoenix Mills is Rs 1,900.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight rating on Phoenix Mills.
The target price set for Phoenix Mills is Rs 1,900.

news.title:
The Phoenix Mills Ltd's Q3 FY26 consolidated revenue rose 15% YoY to ₹1,121 cr.
Core business revenue grew 10% YoY to ₹1,023 cr, with retail consumption up 25% YoY.
news.summary:
The Phoenix Mills Ltd's Q3 FY26 consolidated revenue rose 15% YoY to ₹1,121 cr.
Core business revenue grew 10% YoY to ₹1,023 cr, with retail consumption up 25% YoY.

news.title:
Phoenix Mills reported Q3 EBITDA of ₹6.56B, up from ₹5.52B YOY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 58.5% from 56.7% YOY.
news.summary:
Phoenix Mills reported Q3 EBITDA of ₹6.56B, up from ₹5.52B YOY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 58.5% from 56.7% YOY.

news.title:
The Phoenix Mills reported Q3, 9M FY2026 unaudited financial results.
Recognized Rs 25.1 cr impairment, raised subsidiary stake to 58.3%.
news.summary:
The Phoenix Mills reported Q3, 9M FY2026 unaudited financial results.
Recognized Rs 25.1 cr impairment, raised subsidiary stake to 58.3%.

news.title:
The Phoenix Mills Ltd's board to meet on Jan 28, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 FY2026.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results declaration.
news.summary:
The Phoenix Mills Ltd's board to meet on Jan 28, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 FY2026.

news.title:
Phoenix Mills (NSE:PHOENIXLTD) delivered a 38% CAGR over five years, with a 405% share price gain.
The 5-year TSR, including dividends, was 409%, exceeding the share price return alone.
news.summary:
Phoenix Mills (NSE:PHOENIXLTD) delivered a 38% CAGR over five years, with a 405% share price gain.
The 5-year TSR, including dividends, was 409%, exceeding the share price return alone.

news.title:
Nifty Realty index dropped 1.08% to 848.7, marking a 7.85% decline over 7 sessions.
Stock moves: Signatureglobal fell 2.1%, Macrotech 1.8%, Brigade 1.5%, Anant Raj 1.4%, Prestige 1.3%.
news.summary:

news.title:
The Phoenix Mills reports 20% YoY retail consumption growth to ₹4,787 cr in Q3 FY26.
Residential sales surged to ₹140 cr, up from ₹58 cr YoY; strong hospitality performance noted.
news.summary:
